titleStmt.title: SII 11.142: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 142. (B.K. No. 150 of 1928-29). KAṬGĒRI, BĀDĀMI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING IN THE CHĀVAḌI.

summary.p: This damaged inscription is of the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI), who was ruling from Kalyāṇa and registers a gift of money made by his queen Abhinava-Sarasvatī Chandaladēvī, for the Ṛigvēda-khaṇḍikā and the Śāstrakhaṇḍikā. The Mahājanas of the agrahāra Kaḍakeṟe are mentioned.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 21, Īśvara, • • • • pañchamī, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, vyatīpāta, In Īśvara Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa occurred on Pushya ba. 3, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1097, December 24. But in the previous year, i.e., Dhātṛi, Pushya śu. pañchamī fell on Monday, December 22nd, A.D. 1096, though the saṅkrānti occurred two days, later i.e., Wednesday, December 24, A.D. 1096.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramē
svaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
matribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḻu sukhasaṁka
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa
svastiyanavarataparamakalyāṇābhyudaya
hasraphaḷabhōgabhāgini dvitīyalakṣmīsamāne ka
haṁsayāne śriṁgārarasasudhādhāre śrīmatṟibhuva
lladēvacittasahakāravananiraṁtaravasaṁtalakṣmi cāḷukyarāyanarddhāṁga
yarappa śrīmadabhinavasarasvati caṁdaladēviyaru . yamaniyamasvā
raṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpanna rappa
grahāraṁ kaḍakeṟe yāroḍeyapramukhamahā
śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 21 neya Īśvara saṁva
paṁcami sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa vyatī
dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi sidhdhāyadoḷage rugvēdakhaṁ
dyāṇaveṁṭu śāstrakhaṁḍikakke biṭṭa gadyāṇaveṁṭu
pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsiyoḷu kurukṣētra
dapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge paṁcaratnadoḷu kōḍuṁ
hasrabrāhmaṇargge sahasrakavileya
koṭṭa phaḷamakku Ā dhammama naḷidavargge
rumanā kavileyumaṁ
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
rṣasaha The stone is
Digital edition of SII 11.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
